<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation; /** * ChainRequestMatcher verifies that all checks match against a Request instance. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class ChainRequestMatcher implements RequestMatcherInterface { /** * @param iterable<RequestMatcherInterface> $matchers */ public function __construct(private iterable $matchers) { } public function matches(Request $request): bool { foreach ($this->matchers as $matcher) { if (!$matcher->matches($request)) { return false; } } return true; } }
